episodes.title: Bill Gates apologizes to foundation staff for past Epstein ties
episodes.description:
Bill Gates apologized to employees at the Gates Foundation for his past ties to Jeffrey Epstein during a staff town hall, following newly released documents detailing their connection. According to the Wall Street Journal, Gates acknowledged two past affairs that Epstein learned about but said they did not involve Epstein’s victims. Gates called his interactions with Epstein “a huge mistake” and denied any wrongdoing. 


For video licensing inquiries, contact: licensing@veritone.com

episodes.title: Clintons could face contempt proceedings after refusing to testify in the Epstein investigation
episodes.description:
Bill and Hillary Clinton refused to appear before the House Oversight Committee to testify as part of its investigation into Jeffrey Epstein, setting up a legal confrontation as the Republican-led panel threatens to hold them in contempt of Congress. 


For video licensing inquiries, contact: licensing@veritone.com

episodes.title: DOJ releases thousands more Epstein files, including new records of Trump flying on Epstein's jet
episodes.description:
Overnight, the Department of Justice released an additional 10-thousand documents related to its investigation of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.  The latest batch of materials offers new details on the financier's associates, including President Trump. Mr. Trump has not been accused of any wrongdoing in relation to his former friendship with Epstein. 


For video licensing inquiries, contact: licensing@veritone.com
